query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(360015, 'What does theological "anthropology" specifically study?', 'multiple_choice', '["The doctrine of angels","The doctrine of humanity and sin","The doctrine of the church","The study of ancient cultures"]', 'The doctrine of humanity and sin', 1),
(360015, 'According to Genesis 1:26-27, humans are created:', 'multiple_choice', '["As accidents of nature","In the image of God (imago Dei)","As divine beings","Without any special purpose"]', 'In the image of God (imago Dei)', 2),
(360015, 'The Hebrew term nephesh in Genesis 2:7 refers to:', 'multiple_choice', '["The body only","The living soul/being","The spirit only","The mind only"]', 'The living soul/being', 3),
(360015, 'Genesis 3 describes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Human evolution","The fall of humanity into sin","The creation of angels","The flood narrative"]', 'The fall of humanity into sin', 4),
(360015, 'Romans 5:12-21 teaches that through Adam:', 'multiple_choice', '["Sin and death entered the world","Humanity achieved perfection","The law was abolished","Salvation was completed"]', 'Sin and death entered the world', 5),
(360015, 'The doctrine of total depravity means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Humans are as bad as possible","Sin affects every aspect of human nature","Humans cannot do any good","God created humans sinful"]', 'Sin affects every aspect of human nature', 6),
(360015, 'Psalm 8 celebrates humanity''s:', 'multiple_choice', '["Insignificance","Dignity and dominion under God","Independence from God","Equality with God"]', 'Dignity and dominion under God', 7),
(360015, 'The Greek term hamartia primarily means:', 'multiple_choice', '["Perfection","Missing the mark/sin","Righteousness","Wisdom"]', 'Missing the mark/sin', 8),
(360015, 'Augustine''s doctrine of original sin emphasizes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Human innocence","The inherited guilt and corruption from Adam","Human self-sufficiency","The denial of the fall"]', 'The inherited guilt and corruption from Adam', 9),
(360015, 'Why is the doctrine of humanity essential for understanding salvation?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is merely academic","It reveals the depth of human need for divine grace","It proves humans can save themselves","It has no practical application"]', 'It reveals the depth of human need for divine grace', 10),
(360015, 'Explain how the doctrine of the imago Dei provides the foundation for human dignity and the need for redemption.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The imago Dei establishes human dignity as image-bearers of God while also revealing how sin has marred that image and necessitates redemption', 11);

(360015, 'Explain how the doctrine of the imago Dei provides the foundation for human dignity and the need for redemption.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The imago Dei establishes human dignity as image-bearers of God while also revealing how sin has marred that image and necessitates redemption', 11);
